title: Topology Declarations, Property Equivalence, Policies, and Ownership · Diagnostic Repair Bay
summary: An incident engineer receives a plausible but defective versioned topology declaration and ownership manifest; preserve message identity and timing, locate the first broken ownership boundary, and retain a deterministic regression case. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned topology declaration and ownership manifest and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Assign ownership for exchanges, queues, bindings, policies, migrations, rollback, and deletion across application and platform teams.
Make repeated declarations equivalent in type, durability, exclusivity, auto-delete, and immutable arguments and diagnose precondition mismatch.
Choose durable, exclusive server-named, auto-delete, and queue-TTL lifecycles from responsibility and race evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Topology Owner Contract
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug messaging team handles case 1812 in a regional incident workflow during one broker-node restart. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to protect property equivalence and route mutable operations through policy or versioned migration; prove topology rollback before deleting the old binding; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Assign ownership for exchanges, queues, bindings, policies, migrations, rollback, and deletion across application and platform teams.

Inspect the Topology Owner Contract trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Inspect the failure record · Debug Topology Owner Contract.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Topology Migration
